query: Historical dates when NIFC declared National Preparedness Level 5 (PL5) each year 2015-2025, and what month/date PL5 was first reached each year
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of my findings on when NIFC first reached National Preparedness Level 5 (PL5) each year, 2015–2025:

## First PL5 date by year

| Year | First PL5 date |
|------|---------------|
| 2015 | **August 13** |
| 2016 | Never reached PL5 |
| 2017 | **August 10** |
| 2018 | **July 27** |
| 2019 | Never reached PL5 |
| 2020 | **August 19** |
| 2021 | **July 14** (earliest in the window) |
| 2022 | Never reached PL5 |
| 2023 | Never reached PL5 |
| 2024 | **July 18** |
| 2025 | Never reached PL5 (peaked at PL4) |

## Key takeaways
- **6 of 11 years reached PL5** (2015, 2017, 2018, 2020, 2021, 2024); **5 did not** (2016, 2019, 2022, 2023, 2025).
- All first-PL5 dates fell in **July or August**, clustering mid-July to mid-August.
- **Earliest** first-reached date: **July 14, 2021** (contemporaneously called "earliest in 10 years"). **Latest**: August 19, 2020.
- PL5 has only ever occurred during the June–October fire season in this period.

**Methodology note:** I parsed the raw daily NIFC PL archive tables programmatically rather than relying on AI summaries of the HTML, because the summaries produced several misreads (e.g., 2024's first PL5 was mislabeled as July 10, when July 10–17 were actually PL4 and July 18 was the first PL5 day). All dates were cross-validated against news reporting (KCBY for 2021, USDA/OPB for 2025's PL4 peak, KUNC for 2024's late-season PL5).
